title: centella triflora
intro: Centella triflora, also known as Indian pennywort or centella, is a type of herbaceous perennial plant belonging to the hydrocotyle genus. It has been traditionally used in Ayurvedic medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of centella triflora include improved cognitive function, enhanced skin health, and reduced risk of age-related diseases such as Alzheimer's and Parkinson's. Centella triflora can be prepared into various herbal products, including teas, capsules, and topical creams, which can be used to support overall well-being and address specific health concerns.
